summary: First-finish smoke test of Task Relay MVP. Backend CRUD + owner-PIN gating verified via curl on public URL. Frontend e2e flow exercised: passcode auth (wrong+right), member pick, owner PIN unlock (wrong+right), task create/edit/status-change/delete, Board/Day/Log tab navigation, search filter, and log entries. All critical paths pass. App seeds 8 members and default settings on startup.
passed: GET /api/members returns 8 seeded members
GET /api/settings returns {team_name: 'Category team'}
POST /api/auth/team with 'rmcategory26' -> {ok:true}; wrong passcode -> {ok:false}
POST /api/auth/owner with '9090' -> {ok:true}; wrong PIN -> {ok:false}
Owner-only endpoints return 403 'Owner PIN required' without X-Owner-Pin header
POST /api/members (with X-Owner-Pin:9090) creates member 'Ananya'; logged as member_create
DELETE /api/members/{id} with PIN returns {ok:true}; without PIN returns 403
POST /api/tasks creates task (requires assigned_by/assigned_date/due_date); PUT /api/tasks/{id} updates status
DELETE /api/tasks/{id} requires owner PIN (403 without, 200 with)
GET /api/logs returns chronological log entries
Frontend: AuthGate -> wrong passcode kept user on gate, correct passcode revealed member dropdown
Member pick lands on Board with tabs visible
Owner PIN modal: wrong PIN kept modal, correct PIN unlocked Settings/Lock buttons (Owner badge in footer)
Task create via composer succeeds and appears on board
Inline status dropdown change persists (Todo -> Doing)
Task edit via composer updates title on board
Day report tab loads with prev/next/today nav
Log tab shows 7 entries after activity
Search filter input accepts text
Owner task delete works; 'Task deleted' toast visible; card removed from board
notes: Behavior (not a bug): Entering the correct Owner PIN auto-opens the Owner Settings overlay, which can intercept subsequent header clicks until dismissed. Tests handle by pressing Escape. Confirm with main agent if this is intended UX.
Task create requires assigned_by/assigned_date/due_date — composer correctly supplies defaults; manual API callers must include them.
/app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty; credentials were taken from the task brief (passcode rmcategory26 / PIN 9090). Recommend main agent populate the file.
action_items: Optionally: populate /app/memory/test_credentials.md with passcode 'rmcategory26' and PIN '9090' for future test runs.
Optionally: confirm intended behavior of auto-opening Owner Settings after PIN unlock (or add a header-trigger flag so PIN unlock alone does not pop settings).
